---
title: "Contributing"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
author:
  - "Aleksandar Neshov"
  - "Dinh Marcus Nguyen"
  - "Alexander Toropov"
date: today
---

## Aleks

Drafted the initial project proposal Conducted the first exploratory data analysis
Completed the analysis for Research Question 1, including data preparation, visualisation, and written interpretation

## Marcus

- proposal base draft: description, research questions

- proposal update & readme files

- website + styling, GH: Actions, Pages, structure/management

- data cleaning & research question 2: data preparation, visualization & analysis

## Alex

- Updated the visualisation of the linear models in RQ2

- Wrote the group reflection

- Helped by discussing ideas that other group members implemented while they worked on them
